Scan for a Word
Product User Stories + 8-Week Scrum Delivery Plan
Epic 1: Core Web Discovery & Search
User Stories
1. As a user, I want to scan a QR code or visit the website so I can access the platform quickly.
2. As a user, I want to sign in with my email or phone number so my experience can be personalized.
3. As a user, I want to search by a keyword such as faith, healing, or grace so I can find relevant teachings.
4. As a user, I want to receive a short 90-second teaching clip so I get a quick answer immediately.
5. As a user, I want access to the full message so I can continue listening.
6. As a user, I want to share the clip with others so I can spread the message.
Epic 2: Omnichannel Access
User Stories
1. As a user, I want to search directly from WhatsApp, Telegram, or Messenger so I can use the platform from apps I already use.
2. As a user, I want my search history and preferences to remain consistent across channels.
Epic 3: AI Personalization
User Stories
1. As a user, I want to save my current life situation so the content becomes more relevant.
2. As a user, I want to receive a daily personalized word so I stay encouraged consistently.
3. As a user, I want recommendations based on past searches and life context.
